tests.title: Password login survives relaunch
tests.description: Logs in with the embedded password flow, relaunches the app without resetting state, and verifies the authenticated session is restored.

tests.title: Embedded SAML login via mock Okta
tests.description: Triggers a SAML login hint, taps the mock Okta button in the embedded WebView, and verifies authentication.

tests.title: Embedded OIDC login via mock Okta
tests.description: Triggers an OIDC login hint, taps the mock Okta button in the embedded WebView, and verifies authentication.

tests.title: Request authorize with seeded refresh token
tests.description: Seeds a refresh token, triggers requestAuthorize, and verifies the session is established.

tests.title: Custom SSO browser handoff completes login
tests.description: Initiates a custom SSO flow that opens a browser, mock server completes the handoff, and the user is authenticated.

tests.title: Direct social browser handoff completes login
tests.description: Initiates a direct social login that opens a browser, mock server completes the handoff, and the user is authenticated.

tests.title: Google social login via system web auth session
tests.description: Triggers Google social login, the Custom Tab loads the mock Google page, auto-completes, and the user is authenticated.

tests.title: Google social OAuth error shows toast
tests.description: Queues an OAuth error for the social callback, triggers Google social login, and verifies the error code appears in the UI.

tests.title: Transient probe timeouts do not blink NoConnection
tests.description: Queues slow probe responses, cold-launches the app, and verifies no NoConnection overlay appears.

tests.title: Post-logout probe failures do not blink NoConnection
tests.description: Logs in, logs out, queues probe failures, relaunches, and verifies no NoConnection overlay appears.

tests.title: Offline mode activates when network path unavailable
tests.description: Logs in, relaunches with forced offline, and verifies the offline mode badge and preserved token version.

tests.title: Expired access token refreshes on authenticated relaunch
tests.description: Logs in with short access TTL, waits for expiry, relaunches, and verifies the token is refreshed.

tests.title: Offline mode recovers to online and refreshes token
tests.description: Logs in, goes offline, then comes back online, and verifies the token version changes.

tests.title: Offline mode keeps user logged in until reconnect refreshes expired token
tests.description: Logs in with short TTLs, goes offline, waits for access expiry, reconnects, and verifies token refresh.

tests.title: NoConnection after logout recovers via custom SSO
tests.description: Logs in, logs out, queues probe failure, sees NoConnection, retries, then logs in via custom SSO.

tests.title: Cold launch with offline mode disabled reaches login quickly
tests.description: Queues probe failures, launches with offline mode disabled, and verifies login page appears quickly.

tests.title: Offline mode disabled preserves session during connection loss
tests.description: Logs in with offline mode disabled, queues a connection drop, relaunches, and verifies the session is preserved.

tests.title: Password login works with offline mode disabled
tests.description: Launches with offline mode disabled and verifies password login still works.

tests.title: Logout clears session and relaunch shows login
tests.description: Logs in, logs out, relaunches, and verifies the login page is shown.

tests.title: Expired refresh token clears session and shows login
tests.description: Logs in with very short refresh TTL, waits for expiry, relaunches with reset, and verifies login page.

tests.title: Scheduled token refresh fires before access token expiry
tests.description: Logs in with a 45s access TTL, waits ~35s, and verifies the SDK sent a refresh request.

tests.title: Relaunch with expired access token refreshes via valid refresh token
tests.description: Logs in with a very short access TTL, terminates after access expires but before refresh expires, relaunches, and verifies the token is refreshed.
